title: BGM Site Profiles
description: Community-maintained board game site extraction profiles for BGM Toolbox and BoardGameMatcher.com

name.description: Human-readable name for this profile (e.g., 'Amazon Search Results')

domain.description: Primary domain without www (e.g., 'amazon.com'). Used by the browser extension for quick matching.

url_pattern.description: Regex pattern matched against the full URL. Used by the website for precise matching. First match wins — put specific patterns before generic ones.

selector.description: CSS selector targeting game/product name elements on the page.

threshold.description: Similarity threshold for matching extracted names to the BGM database (0-1). Lower values are more permissive.

filters.description: Post-extraction filters applied to the extracted text.

exclude.description: Regex patterns — matching results are removed.

include.description: Regex patterns — only matching results are kept. Null means keep all.
